# Security Policy

All LIQAA security reports are handled centrally.

- **Email:** [security@liqaa.io](mailto:security@liqaa.io)
- **Response SLA:** 48 hours · severity-rated within 7 days
- **Hall of Fame:** acknowledged at [liqaa.io/security](https://liqaa.io/security)

Please **do not** open public issues for vulnerabilities. Report privately and we will coordinate disclosure.

For full scope, severity matrix, and disclosure timeline, see [`liqaa-meet/.github/SECURITY.md`](https://github.com/hartemyaakoub/liqaa-meet/blob/main/.github/SECURITY.md).
